# Pull Request

**What does this change?**

**Why?**

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run test:all` passes locally
- [ ] New behavior has tests (unit in `tests/`, scenario in `tests/scenarios/` where applicable)
- [ ] No numeric counts added to docs other than `CLAUDE.md` (count single-source-of-truth rule)
- [ ] Shipped content (`commands/`, `agents/`, `pan-wizard-core/`) stays runtime-agnostic
- [ ] No secrets, private project names, or machine-local absolute paths introduced
